pi_items.verified_value: AMOS 2022 Multi-Modality Abdominal Multi-Organ Segmentation Challenge

privileged_info_summary: The target slab mode for Maximum Intensity Projection (MIP) in 3D Slicer is 2. The dataset is the AMOS 2022 Multi-Modality Abdominal Multi-Organ Segmentation Challenge, specifically case amos_0001. The task uses synthetic data generated to simulate abdominal CT anatomy (aorta, spine, liver) as a fallback for the large AMOS dataset.
